message:
chore(beads): add local history and lock file patterns to gitignore

This update enhances the .beads/.gitignore to exclude two additional
categories of local-only, ephemeral files that should never be committed
to the repository:

- .br_history/ — Local history backups created by the br (beads_rust) CLI
  tool. These are machine-specific snapshots used for undo/history features
  and have no value in version control.

- .bv.lock — Lock file created by bv (beads viewer) to prevent concurrent
  access to the beads database. This is a runtime artifact that must remain
  local to each machine's working directory.

Both patterns follow the existing convention in this file of ignoring
daemon runtime files, sync state, and other machine-specific artifacts.
This prevents accidental commits of these files and keeps the repository
clean of local-only state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -42,3 +42,9 @@ sync_base.jsonl
 # contributors to accidentally commit upstream issue databases.
 # The JSONL files (issues.jsonl, interactions.jsonl) and config files
 # are tracked by git by default since no pattern above ignores them.
+
+# Local history backups
+.br_history/
+
+# bv (beads viewer) lock file
+.bv.lock
